role: Headline method-vs-baseline comparison with grouped metrics.
width_policy: Full-width numeric table: tabular* + \extracolsep{\fill}; bounded first semantic column.

role: Show generality across datasets, tasks, benchmarks, or domains.
width_policy: Full-width numeric table with dataset spanners; abbreviate dataset names in headers.

role: Compare quality, efficiency, cost, and robustness without flattening metric families.
width_policy: Grouped numeric table; compact columns for numbers and spanners for metric families.

role: Show component necessity or design contribution.
width_policy: Natural-width table; checkmark columns stay compact; final row can be lightly shaded.

role: Show robustness to thresholds, budgets, context lengths, or decoding settings.
width_policy: Ordered natural-width table; highlight the selected/default row rather than every best value.

role: Compare paired interventions, prompts, modes, or deployment settings.
width_policy: Grouped natural-width table; long setting names appear once as italic group rows.

role: Document train/dev/test/source composition and protocol notes.
width_policy: tabularx with a real prose note column; counts stay compact.

role: Define codes, phases, protocol attributes, or taxonomy rows.
width_policy: tabularx with a prose definition column; group rows prevent repeated long labels.

role: Record reproducibility settings without turning them into performance claims.
width_policy: Phase-grouped key-value table; no best-value styling.

role: Summarize failure modes, counts, examples, and diagnostic implications.
width_policy: tabularx with compact counts and a prose diagnostic/action column.

role: Show representative cases, model outputs, human labels, or explanation snippets.
width_policy: Prose-heavy table with wrapping columns; keep it appendix or narrow body summary.

role: Rank systems while keeping resource and efficiency metrics visible.
width_policy: Mostly numeric scorecard; natural width or tabular* depending on column count.

role: Present compact class-to-class counts when a heatmap is unnecessary.
width_policy: Small numeric matrix; natural-width tabular with clear row/column labels.

role: Track denominators, inclusion rules, checklist items, or appendix completeness.
width_policy: Appendix-grade table with source scope, status, and action; no performance highlighting.

role: Wide benchmark scorecard with model-family group rows and dataset metric spanners.
width_policy: Landscape full-width numeric table: compressed group labels, dataset spanners, and per-column maxima.
